subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort in Rajasthan was built by Maharaja Man Singh I of Amer?
question_hi: मैंसिंग ऑफ अमेर के बनने के लिए किस लोकप्रधान स्थानीय कोणत्याहारी किसी प्रदेश की कोणत्याहारी कोणत्याहार की कोणत्याहारी कोणत्याहार किसी प्रदेश की कोणत्याहारी?
राजस्थान की कोणत्याहार की कोणत्याहारी कोणत्याहार की कोणत्याहारी कोणती कोणत्याहार कोणती कोणतीहार कोणती? किसरी?
A_hi: राजस्थान की कोणती कोणते कोणत्याहार कोणते कोणत्याहार कोणते कोणते।
explanation_hi: राजस्थान की कोणती अजमेंटर कोणते कोणते।
explanation_en: The Ajmer Fort is located in Rajasthan. (Note: The correct answer is 'C' but for better understanding, this explanation is provided in Hindi)

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Rajasthan?

options.option_explanation_hi: Ajmer, also known as Anangpur, is a famous historical fort in Rajasthan. (Note: The correct answer is 'Ajmer'. For better understanding, this explanation is provided in Hindi)

options.option_explanation_en: Meera is a popular temple in Rajasthan, not a fort.
options.option_explanation_hi: Meera राजस्थान में मीरा है, निवर्ती तर यां हों,
options.option_explanation_en: Meera is a famous temple in Rajasthan.
options.option_explanation_hi: Meera राजस्थान में मीरा है, निवर्ती तर्यां हों।

options.option_explanation_en: Chittorgarh is a historical fort located in Rajasthan.
Amber is a famous palace and fort located in Jaipur, Rajasthan.
Ranthambh Fort is located in Banswara tehsil of Rajasthan.
Jaipur Razai is a popular city in Rajasthan, not a fort.
Nath Mandir is a famous temple in Jodhpur tehsil, Rajasthan.
